_source: buildWindow() parametric — FZK_WINDOW_W=2.0m, FZK_WINDOW_H=1.2m, FZK_WINDOW_SILL=0.8m, p={x:0,y:0}
_note: In test environment (no browser, fetch fails): _windowData=null, _windowGlbCache[0]=null → synthetic path. _syntheticWindow(w=2.0, t=0.2, h=1.2): merged bbox x∈[-1.0,1.0] y∈[-0.1,0.1] z∈[0,1.2]. mesh.position.set(0,0,sill=0.8). Rotation default zero. position_z pins sill height (Brüstungshöhe) at 0.8m (IFC ref #23241/#67296).
